title: Cosmoboard .canvas file
description: Schema for Cosmoboard board files (.canvas). Schema treated as v1, not final.

version.description: Schema version integer. Defaults to 1 when absent.

nodes.description: All items placed on the board. Render order matches array order (later items paint on top).

edges.description: Connections between nodes. May be empty.

x.description: Horizontal pan offset in canvas coordinates.

y.description: Vertical pan offset in canvas coordinates.

z.description: Zoom scale factor. 1.0 = 100%. Values less than 1.0 zoom out.

Edge.description: A connection between two nodes. Stored but not actively rendered in the current engine.

NodeBase.description: Geometry envelope shared by all node types.

id.description: Unique identifier for this node within this board.

x.description: Left edge of the node in canvas coordinates.

y.description: Top edge of the node in canvas coordinates.

width.description: Width of the node in canvas coordinates.

height.description: Height of the node in canvas coordinates.

allOf.description: Plain-text note or inline-SVG freehand drawing stroke.

text.description: Content. Plain text for notes; an inline <svg> string for drawing strokes.

allOf.description: URL bookmark card with optional rich-preview metadata.

url.description: The target URL. May be empty string while the user is editing.

image.description: Preview image URL or data: URI.

embedMode.description: preview renders a card; live mounts an interactive iframe. Defaults to preview.

hasAdjustedRatio.description: Whether the node aspect ratio has been manually adjusted.

embedRatio.description: Stored aspect ratio for iframe embeds (width / height).

isEditingUrl.description: Ephemeral flag indicating the URL input is open. Should be false or absent in saved files.

allOf.description: Inline render of a .md file referenced by path.

file.description: Path to the source markdown file.

href.description: Navigation href for opening the file.

title.description: Display title shown when the file is collapsed or loading.

_rawMarkdown.description: Cached raw markdown content. Treated as a cache — the file is authoritative.

allOf.description: Read-only embedded preview of another board.

boardSlug.description: Slug identifier of the linked board.

boardSource.description: Relative path to the linked board's .canvas file.

boardHref.description: Navigation href for opening the linked board in its full-page view.

title.description: Display title for the preview card.

description.description: Short description shown in the card footer.

allOf.description: Live data table sourced from a JSON collection.

source.description: Path to the source JSON file.

collection.description: Optional sub-collection name within the source file.

columns.description: Ordered list of column names to display.

title.description: Display title for the base card header.

allOf.description: Embedded image or binary asset stored as a data: URI or file path.

file.description: data: URI containing the file content, or a path to the source asset.

hasAdjustedRatio.description: Whether the node aspect ratio has been manually adjusted.

allOf.description: Embedded application card backed by an app configuration record.

source.description: Path to the app configuration JSON file.

appConfig.description: Inline snapshot of the app config. Treated as a cache — the source file is authoritative.

Node.description: Any board item. Discriminated by the 'type' field.
